objective: AUTO_FOLDER_REFACTOR_BUGFIND: visibility refactors under lib to expose hidden import/provenance/endpoint assumptions without changing public behavior except proven regressions.
completedSlices: Added parsesSharedTextTokenWrappedInAngleBrackets regression in features/servers/shared/connection_import/parser_regression_test.dart; it failed before the fix because token delimiter handling supported quotes/backticks but not the same angle wrappers already supported for copied URLs.
Made shared-text token wrapper policy explicit in features/servers/shared/connection_import/parser.dart by adding angle brackets to the leading/trailing token delimiter contract.

Added prefersConnectionPathOverEarlierEqualRankMetadataUrl regression in features/servers/shared/connection_import/parser_regression_test.dart; it failed before fix because equal-rank metadata-only URLs were resolved by source order, allowing an earlier docs URL to steal a later connection URL's metadata provenance.
Made shared-text endpoint tie-breaking explicit in features/servers/shared/connection_import/parser.dart with hasConnectionPath and _connectionPathSegments for equal-rank URL candidates.
nextCandidates: features/servers/setup connect-intent event/initial ordering: ensure stream imports cannot be overwritten by stale initial replay if native emits both
features/servers/shared/connection_import token grammar visibility: distinguish broad human-entered tokens from accidental prose labels beyond URL-shaped values
features/servers/pairing token edit provenance policy at widget level if product decides credential edits should also clear pairing-link failure copy
validationReceipts: dart run features/servers/shared/connection_import/parser_regression_test.dart (failed before fix: angle-bracketed labeled token parsed as <shared_secret instead of shared_secret)
dart run features/servers/shared/connection_import/parser_regression_test.dart (failed before fix: equal-rank metadata URL selected https://docs.example instead of later /connect URL)
